text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Budget/commitment lifecycle (encumbrance accounting), neither company had it; approval limits are NOT budget control. Soft check at requisition warns if value > availableAmount but never blocks and never posts. Over-budget override gateway: Budget Owner approves (logged) or the
requisition is revised. Hard commit at PO issue: guard availableAmount >= poValue OR approved override; on commit availableAmount

-= amount and committedAmount += amount and a Commitment record is created. Relief at GR/invoice: committedAmount -= amount and actualAmount += amount; availableAmount unchanged at relief. Commitment-vs-actual reporting per cost-center/period. A returned quantity reverses the relief.
